body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48480", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-325", "name": "Missing Cryptographic Step"}], "description": "The codec-ohttp implementation of draft-ietf-ohai-chunked-ohttp does not verify that a cryptographically-signed final chunk was received before the outer HTTP body terminates. An on-path adversary (the OHTTP relay itself, or any MITM on the relay↔gateway or relay↔client transport) can forward a prefix of a legitimate chunked-OHTTP message—cut at a non-final chunk boundary—and close the outer body cleanly, producing no decryption error and no exception in the receiving application.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00167, "percentile": 0.06233}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:59:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48480"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-04T19:16:30Z", "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:59:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/security/advisories/GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48480", "https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/commit/28f977f293591a4e837bd59ceb441f9f70349915", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/security-advisories/GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp", "summary": "OHttpVersionChunkDraft: Missing Final-Chunk Enforcement Leads to Undetected Stream Truncation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:59:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6fj-869h-4f6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.22.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty.incubator:netty-incubator-codec-ohttp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.22.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
